hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$input_json = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $fp = $input_json.tool_input.file_path; if ($fp -match 'ETHAN_AI_Transformation_Tool_3\.html$') { $dir = Split-Path $fp; $ver_dir = Join-Path $dir 'versions'; if (-not (Test-Path $ver_dir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $ver_dir | Out-Null }; $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'; $dest = Join-Path $ver_dir ('ETHAN_AI_Transformation_Tool_3_' + $ts + '.html'); Copy-Item $fp $dest } "
